name: caregap-mcp
description: SHARP-on-MCP compliant server for HEDIS/CMS quality-measure gap identification and closure

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run phi-scan
scripts.phi-scan: node --eval "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const r=execSync('grep -rn --include=*.ts --include=*.json \"[0-9][0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]\" src/ || true').toString().trim();if(r){console.error('PHI scan FAILED — possible SSN patterns in src/:\n'+r);process.exit(1)}else{console.log('PHI scan passed — no SSN patterns found in source')}"
